mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.description, g.is_system, g.is_active, g.created_at, g.created_by, g.updated_at, g.updated_by, g.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code c WHERE c.group_id = g.id AND c.deleted = 0) AS code_count FROM common_code_group g WHERE g.deleted = 0 ORDER BY g.group_code ASC

SELECT g.id, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.description, g.is_system, g.is_active, g.created_at, g.created_by, g.updated_at, g.updated_by, g.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code c WHERE c.group_id = g.id AND c.deleted = 0) AS code_count FROM common_code_group g WHERE g.id = #{id} AND g.deleted = 0

SELECT g.id, g.group_code, g.group_name, g.description, g.is_system, g.is_active, g.created_at, g.created_by, g.updated_at, g.updated_by, g.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code c WHERE c.group_id = g.id AND c.deleted = 0) AS code_count FROM common_code_group g WHERE g.group_code = #{groupCode} AND g.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM common_code WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_code_group ( group_code, group_name, description, is_system, is_active, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{groupName}, #{description}, IFNULL(#{isSystem}, 0), IFNULL(#{isActive}, 1), NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE common_code_group SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
